languages.text: Отступление мгновенно переросло в паническое бегство. Даже свита Вольного Торговца, закаленная в сотнях битв, не ушла невредимой: я слышал стон сервомоторов, когда твари сорвали мехадендрит магоса, и видел, как иные твари разрывали отставших на куски. Мы бежали, оставляя за собой кровавый след, гонимые призрачной надеждой на спасение... и даже не заметили, как преследователи отступили. Я и потомок остались в окружении израненных соратников и горстки обессилевших людей.
languages.translation_comment:
Травмы у РТ и членов свиты в финале
Скрытность -1

traits.locale_text: Отступление мгновенно переросло в паническое бегство, когда из стен, пола и потолка начали выплывать десятки жутких призраков. Укрыться было негде: для этих тварей материя не существовала. Мерцающие лезвия проходили сквозь керамит и кости, не встречая сопротивления, с легкостью разрывая бегущих на куски. Даже свита Вольного Торговца, закаленная в сотнях битв, не ушла невредимой: я слышал стон сервомоторов, когда заостренный хвост с играючи срезал мехадендрит магоса, и видел, как архмилитант пошатнулся от удара, унесшего с собой руку до локтя.

languages.translation_comment:
Травмы у РТ и членов свиты в финале
Скрытность -1

languages.text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.
languages.original_text: Отступление мгновенно переросло в паническое бегство. Даже свита Вольного Торговца, закаленная в сотнях битв, не ушла невредимой: я слышал стон сервомоторов, когда твари сорвали мехадендрит магоса, и видел, как иные твари разрывали отставших на куски. Мы бежали, оставляя за собой кровавый след, гонимые призрачной надеждой на спасение... и даже не заметили, как преследователи отступили. Я и потомок остались в окружении израненных соратников и горстки обессилевших людей.

traits.locale_text: The retreat instantly turned into a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted people.

The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

The retreat instantly turned into a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. We fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, until the unfathomable intelligence that was directing the guards suddenly called them off, leaving the Rogue Trader and me surrounded by wounded comrades and a meagre handful of terrified souls.

Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted people.

The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

languages.text: 撤退瞬间沦为惊慌溃逃。即便是身经百战的行商浪人随从，也不能全身而退。我听见伺服电机哀鸣，那是怪物撕下了一名贤者的机械触须；我还看见其它怪物将掉队者撕成碎片。我们被一丝渺茫的生还希望驱使，一路奔逃，身后留下一串血迹……甚至都没注意到追兵已经退去。最后剩下的，只有我与继承人，几名负伤的战友，以及少数精疲力竭的凡人。
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

traits.locale_text: 撤退瞬间沦为惊慌溃逃。即便是身经百战的行商浪人随从，也不能全身而退。我听见伺服电机哀鸣，那是怪物撕下了一名贤者的机械触须；我还看见其它怪物将掉队者撕成碎片。我们被一丝渺茫的生还希望驱使，一路奔逃，身后留下一串血迹……甚至都没注意到追兵已经退去。最后剩下的，只有我与继承人，几名负伤的战友，以及少数精疲力竭的凡人。

languages.text: Presos del pánico, la retirada no tardó en convertirse en una huida desesperada. Ni siquiera el séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, curtido en cientos de batallas, escapó ileso: escuché cómo los servomotores gemían cuando las criaturas arrancaron la mecadendrita de un magos, y vi cómo los más rezagados caían víctimas de estos seres. Mientras huimos dejando un rastro de sangre a nuestro paso, nos guiaba una tenue esperanza de salvación. Ni siquiera nos dimos cuenta de que nuestros perseguidores se habían detenido. Solo quedábamos mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo, rodeados de camaradas heridos y un puñado de personas agotadas.
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

traits.locale_text: Presos del pánico, la retirada no tardó en convertirse en una huida desesperada. Ni siquiera el séquito de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente, curtido en cientos de batallas, escapó ileso: escuché cómo los servomotores gemían cuando las criaturas arrancaron la mecadendrita de un magos, y vi cómo los más rezagados caían víctimas de estos seres. Mientras huimos dejando un rastro de sangre a nuestro paso, nos guiaba una tenue esperanza de salvación. Ni siquiera nos dimos cuenta de que nuestros perseguidores se habían detenido. Solo quedábamos mi hereder{mf|o|a} y yo, rodeados de camaradas heridos y un puñado de personas agotadas.

languages.text: Immédiatement, la retraite laissa place à une fuite paniquée. Même l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, pourtant largement endurci par les combats, ne s'en tira pas indemne : j'entendis le grognement de servomoteurs alors que les créatures arrachaient la mécadendrite d'un magos, tandis que d'autres entités taillaient les retardataires en pièces. Nous prîmes nos jambes à notre cou, laissant derrière nous une traînée de sang, dans l'espoir de trouver une issue... sans même remarquer que nos poursuivants avaient eux-mêmes battu en retraite, abandonnant {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière} et moi-même au milieu de nos camarades blessés et d'une poignée d'humains épuisés.
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

traits.locale_text: Immédiatement, la retraite laissa place à une fuite paniquée. Même l'entourage {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande}, pourtant largement endurci par les combats, ne s'en tira pas indemne : j'entendis le grognement de servomoteurs alors que les créatures arrachaient la mécadendrite d'un magos, tandis que d'autres entités taillaient les retardataires en pièces. Nous prîmes nos jambes à notre cou, laissant derrière nous une traînée de sang, dans l'espoir de trouver une issue... sans même remarquer que nos poursuivants avaient eux-mêmes battu en retraite, abandonnant {mf|mon héritier|mon héritière} et moi-même au milieu de nos camarades blessés et d'une poignée d'humains épuisés.

languages.text: Geri çekilme, anında panik hâlinde bir kaçışa dönüştü. Hür Tacir'in yüzlerce savaş görmüş maiyeti bile yarasız beresiz kurtulamadı: Yaratıklar bir Magos'un mekadentritini koparırken hizmotorların iniltisini duydum ve diğer yaratıların geride kalanları parçaladığını gördüm. Ardımızda kanlı bir iz bırakarak, cılız bir kurtuluş umuduyla teşvik edilmiş bir hâlde kaçarken... Peşimizdekilerin geri çekildiğini fark etmedik bile. Vârisim ve ben, yaralı yoldaşlarımızın ve bir avuç tamamen bitkin düşmüş insanın arasında kalmıştık.
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

traits.locale_text: Geri çekilme, anında panik hâlinde bir kaçışa dönüştü. Hür Tacir'in yüzlerce savaş görmüş maiyeti bile yarasız beresiz kurtulamadı: Yaratıklar bir Magos'un mekadentritini koparırken hizmotorların iniltisini duydum ve diğer yaratıların geride kalanları parçaladığını gördüm. Ardımızda kanlı bir iz bırakarak, cılız bir kurtuluş umuduyla teşvik edilmiş bir hâlde kaçarken... Peşimizdekilerin geri çekildiğini fark etmedik bile. Vârisim ve ben, yaralı yoldaşlarımızın ve bir avuç tamamen bitkin düşmüş insanın arasında kalmıştık.

languages.text: Der Rückzug geriet rasch zu einer panischen Flucht. Selbst das in Hunderten von Schlachten gestählte Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} entkam nicht unversehrt: Ich hörte das Stöhnen von Servomotoren, als die Kreaturen einem der Magos die Mechadendriten ausrissen und einige Nachzügler zerfetzten. Als wir getrieben von einer schwachen Hoffnung auf Rettung flohen und eine blutige Spur hinterließen, bemerkten wir nicht einmal, dass unsere Verfolger von uns abgelassen hatten. {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} und ich hatten mit unseren verwundeten Kameraden und einer Handvoll erschöpfter Menschen überlebt.
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly became a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. As we fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, spurred on by a faint hope of salvation... we did not even notice that our pursuers had fallen back. My scion and I were left among our wounded comrades and a handful of thoroughly exhausted humans.

traits.locale_text: Der Rückzug geriet rasch zu einer panischen Flucht. Selbst das in Hunderten von Schlachten gestählte Gefolge {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} entkam nicht unversehrt: Ich hörte das Stöhnen von Servomotoren, als die Kreaturen einem der Magos die Mechadendriten ausrissen und einige Nachzügler zerfetzten. Als wir getrieben von einer schwachen Hoffnung auf Rettung flohen und eine blutige Spur hinterließen, bemerkten wir nicht einmal, dass unsere Verfolger von uns abgelassen hatten. {mf|Mein Erbe|Meine Erbin} und ich hatten mit unseren verwundeten Kameraden und einer Handvoll erschöpfter Menschen überlebt.

languages.text: その退却は瞬く間にパニックに陥った逃走へと変わった。数百の戦いを経験したローグトレーダーの側近たちも、傷一つ負わずには逃れられなかった。機械腕を破壊するような機械の唸り声、後れを取った者をバラバラに引き裂くような獣の咆哮を聞いた。血まみれの足跡を残しながら、我々は逃げ続けた。だが、突然、守備隊を指揮していた不可解な知性が、その指示を止めた。ローグトレーダーと私は、負傷した仲間たちと、わずかな数の恐怖に震える者たちで囲まれた。
languages.original_text: The retreat instantly turned into a panicked flight. Even the Rogue Trader's retinue, hardened through hundreds of battles, did not escape unscathed: I heard the groan of servo-motors as the creatures ripped off the mechadendrite of one Magos, and saw other creatures tear stragglers to pieces. We fled, leaving a bloody trail behind us, until the unfathomable intelligence that was directing the guards suddenly called them off, leaving the Rogue Trader and me surrounded by wounded comrades and a meagre handful of terrified souls.
